summary: Vertical selfie-style video of the DHS Secretary, a bearded man, speaking directly to camera. He is shown in a wood-trimmed office with blue-grey walls and framed ranch photographs, wearing a white dress shirt and patterned tie in some shots. Burned-in caption subtitles run along the bottom of the frame. The audio is him thanking DHS employees who worked through a 76-day government shutdown and announcing that the government has reopened. No music bed.

script.scene: Bearded man in white shirt and tie speaks to camera in a blue-walled wood-trimmed office with framed photos; burned-in caption subtitles at bottom.
